news.headline: Rare Yunnan snub-nosed monkey, found only at high altitudes in China, faces habitat threats.
news.summary: In Shangri-La, China, on December 20, 2024, it was reported that the Yunnan snub-nosed monkey, an endangered primate species exclusive to China, is restricted to high-altitude regions where Yunnan and Xizang intersect. Due to this specialized habitat need, the monkey's population remains critically low.

news.headline: New update on the offer for subscription: significant rise in interest, with 30% more subscriptions than last month.
Graycliff Partners sells Landmark Structures to Cerberus Capital Management, a key player in water infrastructure.
news.summary: Graycliff Partners LP revealed the sale of Landmark Structures, a prominent supplier of water and industrial storage infrastructure solutions, to Cerberus Capital Management, L.P. Landmark is recognized for its design, production, and installation of elevated water tanks for municipal and private water utilities across the U.S. and Canada. Graycliff's acquisition fueled Landmark's significant growth, culminating in this successful transaction.

news.headline: Eton Pharmaceuticals acquires Increlex from Ipsen to treat SPIGFD in pediatric patients aged 2+, on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Deer Park-based Eton Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ETON) finalized the acquisition of Increlex® (mecasermin injection) from Ipsen S.A. The product is designed to aid pediatric patients over 2 years old with severe primary insulin-like growth factor 1 deficiency (SPIGFD). Eton aims to develop and market treatments for rare diseases and this transaction is a part of that strategy.

news.headline: Global AC Motors Market expected to reach $6.60 billion by 2029, growing at a CAGR of 7.5% from $4.60 billion in 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Delray Beach, Florida, it was reported that the worldwide AC Motors Market is projected to increase from an estimated value of USD 4.60 billion in 2024 to USD 6.60 billion by 2029, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.5% expected during the forecast period. This growth is primarily attributed to industrial expansion, quick urban development, and heightened usage in HVAC systems.

news.headline: Auriant Mining AB's shares (AUR) moving from First North Premier Segment to Nasdaq First North Growth Market due to <10 MEUR threshold.
news.summary: Auriant Mining AB has been notified by the Exchange of the transfer of its shares (AUR, ISIN code SE0001337213) from the First North Premier Segment to Nasdaq First North Growth Market. This transition is set to occur on Thursday, January 2, 2025, with the shift attributed to the Company's market capitalization averaging below 10 million EUR, a prerequisite for the First North Premier Segment listing.

news.headline: SP Group began a share buy-back program on August 26, 2024, as per announcement #12/2024 on August 23, 2024.
news.summary: SP Group announced on August 23, 2024, that they have started a share buy-back program on August 26, 2024. The program is referenced as company announcement no. 12/2024, and marks an important step for the company's financial strategy.

news.headline: Finance news roundup includes 12 stories - 10 economic insights for 2025, rising Fortune 500 execs. - PR Newswire.
news.summary: This week, a selection of notable financial news releases from PR Newswire included 10 economic predictions for 2025 and profiles of prominent up-and-coming Fortune 500 executives. Released in New York on December 20, 2024, these press releases serve as essential insights into the future of the economy. The reports highlight crucial factors expected to shape the economic landscape in 2025 and showcase the emerging leaders making significant impacts within the Fortune 500 companies. These releases capture the ongoing evolution and key players within the financial sector, providing invaluable information for investors and industry professionals.

news.headline: Fitch Ratings: The performance of global shipping segments to diverge in 2025.
Uzbekistan's natural gas production drops 4.7% year on year in Jan-Nov.
Westinghouse & Kozloduy NPP signed contract for safety analysis of new nuclear fuel design for Unit 6 in Bulgaria ministry presence.
news.summary: In Sofia, Bulgaria, Westinghouse Electric Company and Kozloduy Nuclear Power Plant (KNPP) have inked a fresh contract for a safety analysis aimed at obtaining a license for a novel nuclear fuel assembly design that aligns with the KNPP Unit 6's existing fuel design. This agreement, signed at Bulgaria’s Ministry of Energy in the presence of Minister Vladimir Malinov, signifies a crucial step towards fuel diversification for Unit 6. The deal follows the successful delivery of the initial batch of VVER-1000 fuel assemblies to KNPP, ensuring progress and modernization in the nuclear energy sector.

news.headline: Foresight partners with SoftBank and Japanese automaker for enhanced road safety using C-V2X technology.
news.summary: In Israel on December 20, 2024, Foresight Autonomous Holdings Ltd. (FRSX) shared that its subsidiary, Eye-Net Mobile Ltd., has commenced a multi-phase deal with SoftBank Corp. (9434.T) and a major Japanese automaker. Through this partnership, they will assess Eye-Net’s innovative cellular vehicle-to-everything (C-V2X) technology for integration into advanced driver assistance systems. The goal is to enhance road safety standards, marking a significant step in the industry.

news.headline: Coinbase's revenue surpasses Nasdaq; analysts highlight higher fees drive transaction revenue despite lower volume.
news.summary: According to an analyst, although Coinbase may have lower volume compared to other platforms, they generate higher transaction revenue due to charging higher fees.

news.headline: COCA launches $100,000 New Year Treasure Hunt promo with $COCA tokens, running Dec 20, 2024 - Jan 20, 2025.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on December 20, 2024, COCA, a rapidly expanding crypto super app, is launching its largest promotion of the year called the New Year Treasure Hunt. This promotion will take place from December 20, 2024, to January 20, 2025, allowing participants to vie for a portion of the rewards.

news.headline: Marshall Wace grants $1 billion to former Citadel trader Northridge
This week in health news: 12 stories including gene-edited pig kidney transplant, portable fentanyl detection device.
news.summary: This week's significant healthcare updates feature a breakthrough in a gene-edited pig kidney transplant, marking a pioneering advancement. Another notable highlight is the unveiling of the world's premier portable fentanyl detection device, which aims to combat substance abuse. Additionally, fresh insights on the correlation between social media usage and youth mental health have emerged, shedding light on this critical issue. These groundbreaking revelations were revealed via PR Newswire on December 20, 2024.

news.headline: Vertiv (NYSE: VRT) buys Centrifugal Chiller Tech from BiXin Energy (Suzhou) Co., diversifying global solutions portfolio.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, Vertiv (NYSE: VRT), a leading provider of digital infrastructure and continuity solutions, revealed today that its Chinese subsidiary has acquired specific assets and technologies from BiXin Energy Technology (Suzhou) Co., Ltd (BSE), a company renowned for manufacturing chillers, heat pumps, heat-recovery solutions, and air-handling units. This move, aimed at broadening Vertiv's range of chillers, reinforces its collection of crucial technologies and solutions.

news.headline: Cable One amends Mega Broadband investment, now has flexibility on acquiring full ownership. Cable One owns 45% stake in MBI.
news.summary: Phoenix-based Cable One, Inc. (NYSE: CABO) has adjusted the terms of its investment in Mega Broadband Investments Holdings LLC (MBI), where it currently holds a 45% stake. This amendment allows Cable One greater flexibility in its potential acquisition of full ownership of MBI. The remaining ownership of MBI is held by affiliates of GTCR LLC and MBI management. The changes in the terms provide Cable One with increased control over the timing of the acquisition process.

news.headline: PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE: PRT) declared a monthly cash distribution to record holders of trust units, payable on Jan 15.
news.summary: In Dallas on December 20, 2024, PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE: PRT) announced the declaration of a monthly cash distribution for record holders of its trust units. Beneficial interest holders as of December 31, 2024, will receive the payment on January 15, 2025. This distribution pertains to Trust Units and is a regular occurrence for investors in the Trust.

news.headline: Lubricants market projected to reach USD 178.1 billion by 2025 - MarketsandMarkets report.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report titled "Lubricants Market Outlook 2025 Navigating the sustainable and disruptive Horizon of Tomorrow" was released by MarketsandMarkets. According to the report, the lubricants market was valued at USD 173.5 billion in 2024 and is expected to rise to USD 178.1 billion in the near future.

news.headline: Hyperscale Data announces $0.2708333 monthly dividend per share for 13.00% Series D Preferred Stock.
news.summary: Hyperscale Data has announced a monthly cash dividend of $0.2708333 per share for its 13.00% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock.

news.headline: In 2025, Kvika banki hf. will publish interim and annual financial statements as per the provided financial calendar.
news.summary: Kvika has announced that it will release its interim and annual consolidated financial statements for the year 2025 based on the following financial calendar.

news.headline: Amazon's revamped drone delivery in Arizona has left an impression, with doubts on public reception.
news.summary: A recent tour of Amazon's updated drone delivery system in Arizona left me amazed by the drones' capabilities, yet dubious about public acceptance.

news.headline: Almacenes Éxito S.A. plans to delist its ADSs from NYSE, each representing eight common shares, and deregister securities.
news.summary: Almacenes Éxito S.A. announced its decision to voluntarily delist its American depositary shares (ADSs) from the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) and deregister the Company’s securities under the U.S. Securities Exchange Act. Each ADS represents eight common shares of the Company. The Board of Directors approved this decision, which affects shareholders and the market. Almacenes Éxito S.A. is listed under the tickers BVC: EXITO, NYSE: EXTO, and B3: EXCO32.

news.headline: Tech news roundup: $10B investment for Databricks, new AI model for Hollywood, CES 2025 preview.
news.summary: This week, significant tech news was unveiled via PR Newswire, featuring key announcements such as a substantial $10 billion investment in Databricks. Alongside this, a groundbreaking AI model tailored for Hollywood was introduced. Additionally, a glimpse into the latest happenings at CES 2025 was shared. The tech industry is abuzz with these developments, showcasing the ongoing innovation and investment in this ever-evolving sector.

news.headline: Jyske Realkredit sets coupon interest rates for various series from 2.75% to 3.12% p.a. from Jan 1 to Mar 31, 2025. Contact Christian Bech-Ravn for inquiries.
news.summary: Jyske Realkredit has announced the fixing of coupon interest rates for various series of bonds from 1st January 2025 to 31st March 2025. The interest rates for the mentioned bonds range from 2.75% p.a. to 3.12% p.a. Series 422.E.OA Cb3 ju27 RF with ISIN DK0009414682 has the highest rate at 3.12% p.a., while Series 422.E.OA Cb3 ju25 RF with ISIN DK0009405425 has the lowest rate at 2.75% p.a. This announcement was made on 20th December 2024 and queries can be directed to Christian Bech-Ravn, Head of Investor Relations at Jyske Realkredit.

news.headline: Fennec Pharmaceuticals' PEDMARQSI® recommended by NICE for preventing cisplatin-induced hearing loss in children in England and Wales, the first treatment within NHS for 1 month-17 years olds.
news.summary: PEDMARQSI® is now accessible within NHS England and Wales as the exclusive remedy for safeguarding children and young individuals (aged 1 month to 17 years) from cisplatin-induced ototoxicity.

news.headline: FINMA acknowledges criticism from parliamentary committee
Finma supports proposed authority expansion following Credit Suisse report
FINMA to bolster supervision and apply lessons from Credit Suisse collapse
MarketsandMarkets report predicts nutraceuticals market growth with focus on personalized nutrition & sustainability by 2025.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida on December 20, 2024, a research report titled "Nutraceuticals & Dietary Supplements Industry Outlook 2025" was released. The report highlights key trends shaping the future of wellness, including personalized nutrition, sustainability, and technological advancements. The report discusses industry predictions up to 2025, emphasizing the importance of these factors in driving the sector forward. The findings indicate a significant focus on personalized nutrition and sustainability in the industry, with technological advancements playing a crucial role. This comprehensive analysis offers valuable insights for industry professionals, with a particular focus on the year 2025.

news.headline: AngloGold Ashanti plc announces board committee changes, effective from 1 January. Key members: Alan Ferguson, Al Garner, Jochen Tilk.
news.summary: AngloGold Ashanti plc has revealed the new lineup for its Board Committees effective January 1. The Audit and Risk Committee will include Alan Ferguson (Chair), Kojo Busia, Bruce Cleaver, Rhidwaan Gasant, Al Garner, Jinhee Magie, and Diana Sands. The Compensation and Human Resources Committee will be chaired by Al Garner, with members Alan Ferguson, Rhidwaan Gasant, Nicky Newton-King, and Diana Sands. The Nominations and Governance Committee will be led by Jochen Tilk, with Rhidwaan and others as members.

news.headline: Highlights of this week's consumer news: Taco Bell's new chicken nuggets, Planet Fitness's New Year's Eve celebrations, USPS unveiling 2025 stamps.
news.summary: This week, various notable consumer and retail updates were reported by PR Newswire, such as Taco Bell launching new chicken nuggets, Planet Fitness hosting New Year's Eve festivities, and USPS planning to release stamps for 2025. The updates were shared from New York on December 20, 2024. These announcements were part of thousands of press releases distributed.

news.headline: Musk's political week stirs concerns in Washington and Europe.
Conversion of A shares to B shares per company's articles resulted in updated voting rights and share capital.
news.summary: The latest report indicates an increase in the unemployment rate with approximately 10 million people currently without jobs. The government's stimulus package, valued at around $2 trillion, aims to provide financial relief to businesses and individuals impacted by the economic downturn. Additionally, the stock market experienced a significant drop of 20% in the past month, reflecting the overall uncertainty and volatility in the financial sector. Experts are predicting a slow recovery for the economy in the upcoming months as the pandemic continues to affect various industries.

news.headline: EHGO acquires D&K Asset Management, partnered with Liuli Ball Culture for Tencent's business ecosystem, announced on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Shanghai, Eshallgo Inc, a prominent Chinese office integrator, agent, and service provider traded on NasdaqCM under the symbol EHGO, made a significant strategic decision. The Company revealed its acquisition of D&K Asset Management (Hong Kong) Co., Ltd. This move is expected to have a profound impact on Eshallgo's operations and is poised to further solidify its position in the market.

news.headline: EHGO secures $20 million for entry into Tencent's ecosystem, partnering with CS Asia Opportunities Master Fund.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Shanghai, Eshallgo Inc (NasdaqCM: EHGO), a prominent Chinese office integrator, agent, and service provider, announced a collaboration with the investment fund CS Asia Opportunities Master Fund. This partnership signifies a significant venture in the industry.

news.headline: Actualize Solar expands renewable energy portfolio to 1.5 GW, signing 5 new PPAs with a major US utility. Chief Development Officer aims for continued growth.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, Actualize Solar recently finalized five long-term power purchase agreements (PPAs) with a leading US utility. This significant development signifies the company's commitment to fulfilling customer requirements and achieving full contract fulfillment for their project portfolio. Bob White, the Chief Development Officer of Actualize Solar, expressed enthusiasm regarding the new PPAs and emphasized their objective to continue expanding. Notably, last year, the company successfully secured three long-term PPAs for their utility-scale projects, indicating a steady growth trajectory.

news.headline: FreeCast announces Zer0Gap, providing 100% ad fill using new programmatic platform.
news.summary: FreeCast has recently introduced Zer0Gap, a new programmatic platform that guarantees 100% ad fill. This innovative technology is revolutionizing the advertising industry by ensuring that all ad inventory is utilized efficiently. With Zer0Gap, advertisers can reach their target audiences effectively without any gaps in ad placements.

news.headline: Bruker unveils 1.2 GHz NMR Spectrometer at Swiss NMR Facility in Zürich to enhance research capabilities.
news.summary: ZURICH - Bruker has confirmed the delivery of a cutting-edge 1.2 GHz Ascend™ Nuclear Magnetic Resonance (NMR) spectrometer to the Swiss High-field NMR Facility. This facility is a collaboration between the University of Basel, ETH Zurich, and the University of Zurich. The installation of this advanced instrument at the University of Zurich will greatly boost the research capabilities of multiple user groups. It will empower them to conduct more sophisticated research in areas such as structural biology and macromolecular analysis. This high-tech NMR spectrometer represents a significant advancement in research equipment at the facility.

news.headline: Marti Technologies, Inc. elects Alex Spiro to Board of Directors. Spiro, a litigator, joins as Class II director.
news.summary: In Istanbul, Marti Technologies, Inc. (NYSE American: MRT), Turkey's primary mobility super app, revealed the appointment of Alex Spiro as a Class II director on its Board of Directors during the 2024 annual general meeting of shareholders. Spiro, renowned as a litigator and a partner at Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan LLP, also holds the position of Chairman at Glassbridge Enterprises. He provides expertise as a board member and strategic advisor to various organizations.

news.headline: Recap: 13 noteworthy press releases this week featuring rising execs, Taco Bell's chicken nuggets, 2025 top vacations.
news.summary: Recapping notable highlights from PR Newswire this week: top emerging executives, Taco Bell's debut of chicken nuggets, and highly anticipated vacation spots for 2025. In New York on Dec. 20, 2024, a plethora of press releases were unveiled. Stay up-to-date on the latest in business and dining as well as the most sought-after travel destinations set to shine in 2025. Get a glimpse into the future with these revelations.

news.headline: Canoo Inc. to conduct 1-for-20 reverse stock split on Dec. 24, 2024. Stock will trade on Nasdaq under ticker symbol "GOEV."
news.summary: Canoo Inc., a high-tech mobility company, has announced a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of its common stock with an effective date of December 24, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The common stock will still trade on The Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol "GOEV" but on a split-adjusted basis from December 24, 2024. Following the reverse stock split, the new CUSIP number for Canoo’s Common Stock will be 13803R300.

news.headline: Emeren Group sells 2.8 MW Maine solar project to Altus Power.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Emeren Group Ltd ("Emeren" or the "Company"), a prominent global solar project developer, owner, and operator, disclosed the sale of a 2.8 MWdc solar project in Maine to Altus Power, Inc. This transaction marks a significant milestone in Emeren's strategic operations within the renewable energy sector. The project's sale further strengthens Altus Power's presence in the solar industry. The deal exemplifies the continued growth and collaboration within the renewable energy market, solidifying both companies' positions as key players in the sustainable energy landscape.

news.headline: Baijiayun's "DuanXunBao" service gets winter upgrade, a one-stop AI video provider. Dec. 20, 2024. (Count: 100)
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Beijing, Baijiayun Group Ltd revealed that its "DuanXunBao" has undergone a winter refresh and upgrade. As a leading provider of AI video solutions, the Company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol RTC. The refreshed Duanxunbao, known for its innovative knowledge delivery approach, has been upgraded to better serve its users.

news.headline: US FDA approves Mesoblast Limited's RYONCIL as MSC product, hailed by ISCT as major milestone. Vancouver, Dec 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 20, 2024, the International Society for Cell & Gene Therapy (ISCT) is commending the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for its groundbreaking approval of Mesoblast Limited's allogenic, bone marrow-derived mesenchymal stromal cell (MSC) product, RYONCIL®. This decision marks a significant advancement in the field of cell and gene therapy and is expected to impact a wide range of patients.

news.headline: Four Seasons Education in China reports unaudited financial results for the first half of fiscal year 2025. Dec 20, 2024.
news.summary: Today in Shanghai, on December 20, 2024, Four Seasons Education (Cayman) Inc. (NYSE: FEDU), a prominent tourism and education service provider in China, revealed its unaudited financial report for the initial half of fiscal year 2025.
